case_title: DAVID ELU VS. JULIE LEE et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER ELU, DAVID TRUSTEE OF THE ELU FAMILY CHARITABLE REMAINDER TRUST AS TO RESPONDENT LEE, JULIE TSE, HA MAN JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

NOTICE OF HEARING RE PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER ELU, DAVID TRUSTEE OF THE ELU FAMILY CHARITABLE REMAINDER TRUST HEARING SET FOR APR-14-2003 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER DAVID EL PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED - GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-14-2003 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER ELU, DAVID TRUSTEE OF THE ELU FAMILY CHARITABLE REMAINDER TRUST RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT LEE, JULIE TSE, HA MAN $60,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $28,360.57 COSTS AND ATTORNEY FEES AWARDED BY ARBITRATOR, TOTAL JUDGMENT $88,360.57, PLUS INTEREST ON THESE AMTS AT LEGAL RATE OF 10% FROM 02/11/03. SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD (AT LENGTH FOR DETAILS)
